cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the order of the books on the shelf step by step. The statements are all logically consistent, so I need to parse each clue carefully. The first clue says the green book is the rightmost. So, if I denote orange as O and gray as G, then O must be to the left of G. So, the position of O is less than the position of G. Third, the purple book is to the left of the yellow book.
